<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Azion](https://www.azion.com/en/products/edge-dns/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/azion/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "azion"
  dnsCredentials:
    # AZION_PERSONAL_TOKEN: Your Azion personal token.
    personalToken: ""
    # AZION_PAGE_SIZE: The page size for the API request (Default: 50)
    pageSize: ""
    # AZION_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # AZION_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # AZION_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 120)
    ttl: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
